{"society_power": 8.0, "state_power": 8.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Post-Chartist civic deepening; free trade; cheaper press", "reasoning": "Society strengthened as working-class energy channeled into unions, cooperatives, and friendly societies, plus the 1855 Stamp Duty repeal and press expansion widened public monitoring. State capacity saw offsetting forces\u2014bureaucratic reform, imperial expansion in India, and public works versus Crimean administrative failures and accountability crises\u2014netting roughly flat at an already-strong level."}
